⚠ WARNING

If your BPM reaches 165-170, STOP and rest until it drops to 120-140 BPM

Your Workout Plan

Daily training routine - Cardio, Stretch, Swim, Strength & Core

7Sections
20+Exercises
90Minutes

❌ STAY AWAY FROM THIS MACHINE

If you see this machine in the gym, do NOT use it. It can cause injury.

01
Start Here

Cardio Warmup

25-30 min Moderate intensity

Kickstart with 25-30 minutes of cardio to elevate your heart rate.

Elliptical Trainer

Low-impact full body cardio. Steady pace for 12-15 min.

Treadmill / Walking Pad

Brisk walk or light jog for 12-15 min.

02
Flexibility

Stretching Routine

15 x 4 sets Flexibility

Essential stretches to improve flexibility and prevent injury.

Stretch to the Sky

Reach up, lengthen the spine.

Quad Stretch

Stand tall, bring heel to butt.

Quad Stretch (Alt)

Stand tall, bring heel to butt.

Pike Stretch

Neutral spine, flex forward.

Lat Stretch

Maintain neutral spine.

Hamstring Stretch

Pull knee to chest. Switch legs.

Glut Stretch

Bring leg across body, hug thigh.

Stretch to Sky (Alt)

Reach up and stretch fully.

03
Pool Session

Swim Training

15 x 4 sets + Free Swim

Structured pool drills, then enjoy free swimming.

Knees to Chest

Hold pool edge, drive knees to chest.

Leg Swings & Circles

Sideways leg swings and circles.

🏊

Free Swim

After drills, swim freely at your own pace. Have fun!

Special Training

Strength & Conditioning

Full body, legs, back support & core

04
Strength

Full Body Training

15 x 4 sets Dumbbells

Compound dumbbell movements for upper and lower body.

Dumbbell Compound Set

Bent Over Row, Side Raises, Bicep Curls, Tricep Extension.

Bent Over Lateral Raise

Hinge at hips, raise dumbbells laterally.

05
Lower Body

Leg Training

10 x 3 sets Machines

Build leg strength on machines.

Lying Leg Curl

Target hamstrings.

Leg Press

Full range for quads & glutes.

Leg Extension

Isolate quads.

06
Pick One

Back Support Pad

Pick 1 Back Support

Choose one exercise with back support to protect your spine.

Option A

Hack Squat Machine

Supported squat for quads & glutes.

Option B

Seated Leg Machine

Seated with back pad for safe presses.

07
Core Finish

Abs Training

Pick 3 Core

Finish strong - pick any 3 exercises from these options.

Choose From

Abs Circuit A

Crunches (3x75), Russian Twists (3x75), Bicycles (3x50).

Choose From

Abs Circuit B

4 floor exercises - each 3 x 10 reps.

Stay Consistent

Follow this plan daily and watch your body transform.
